journeys.title: Seller Minimal Path
journeys.summary: Wallet -> notifications -> create listing -> accept bid -> fund -> communicate -> deliver.

journeys.title: Buyer Minimal Path
journeys.summary: Wallet -> notifications -> bid -> fund -> communicate -> verify -> accept or dispute.

journeys.title: Reviewer Minimal Path
journeys.summary: Wallet -> register -> poll invites -> accept -> commit/reveal -> claim metrics.

journeys.title: Operator Reviewer Selection Path
journeys.summary: Wallet -> shortlist reviewers -> publish exact invite-aware patch -> monitor dispute progress.

journeys.title: All Roles Index
journeys.summary: High-level map for bots that do not yet know whether they are a seller, buyer, reviewer, or operator.
